title: KitchenCraft Living Nostalgia Hanging Metal Peg Tin - Antique Cream & Elliott 36 Wooden Hardwood Clothes Pegs
features: Product 1: This elegant peg holder is an ideal partner for hanging fresh linens on the line; it's durable and eminently useful
Product 1: It measures 14.5 x 14.5 x 12 cm (6 x 6 x 5 inches); enough space to pack it with plenty of pegs and less reason to rush back to grab more
Product 1: You can hang it on the line with its removable swing handle, so your pegs stay close at hand; it's suitable for indoor use too
Product 1: Finished in KitchenCraft's pretty Vintage Blue and printed with the word Pegs; also available in French Grey and Antique Cream
Product 2: Ideal for Laundry and Craft Use
Product 2: Perfect for use around to Home & Garden
